prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约9253→9310→8237→8773→9032，近5年整体在8200–9300区间波动，2025年基准约9032名；近3年呈小幅后移趋势；该校在陕理科/物理类计划2021年40人、2022年40人、2023年43人、2024年45人、2025年42人；2026年计划大幅增至58人，较2025年扩招约38%，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第56位稳步升至2026年第51位，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力获认可；2023年曾有小语种专业位次下降6211位的投档异常记录，但整体影响有限；抖音热度总排名第21位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度升温；海洋科学A+（全国顶尖）、水产A+、食品科学与工程A-、生物学A-；海洋科学、食品科学与工程类等王牌专业直接对应招生，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续高位（高热推荐），该校理科招生涵盖上述方向；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年增长约19.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争基数扩大；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校，无显著地域偏好优势；陕西考生跨省报考该校需权衡地域因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+38%）与考生规模显著增长（+19.7%）的双向作用，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，整体竞争趋于缓和，位次预计后移；但学校排名持续提升、抖音热度较热及热门工科专业吸引力增强，对报考热度有正向拉动。综合权衡后，预测最低位次约11047名，区间10547–11547名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 海洋科学（设有基础学科拔尖计划2.0基地）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、微电子科学与工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 海洋技术
- 自动化
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 大气科学
- 机械设计制造及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物科学类（生态学、生物技术、生物科学）（设有基础学科拔尖计划2.0基地）
- 食品科学与工程类（食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康）
- 化学工程与工艺
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、高分子材料与工程、新能源材料与器件）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10547–11547名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（海洋科学、计算机类）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<10547名）可重点冲刺一档海洋科学等A+学科专业；位次接近区间下限（>11547名）建议以三档优势学科专业（食品科学与工程类、生物科学类）为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9253 → 9310 → 8237 → 8773 → 9032, fluctuating within the 8200–9300 range over the past 5 years, with a baseline of about 9032 in 2025; a slight backward trend in the last 3 years; enrollment plans in Shaanxi for science/physics category: 40 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 58, an expansion of about 38% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, gaining recognition for comprehensive strength; in 2023, there was an abnormal admission record where a minor language major dropped 6211 places, but overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranks 21st overall (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention from applicants; Marine Science A+ (top nationally), Aquaculture A+, Food Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-; flagship majors like Marine Science and Food Science and Engineering are directly recruited, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after (high heat recommendation), and the university's science recruitment covers these directions; in 2026, Shaanxi physics category candidates total about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 2025, significantly expanding the competition base; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, with no significant geographical preference advantage; Shaanxi candidates applying across provinces need to weigh geographical factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of a significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+38%) and a substantial increase in candidate numbers (+19.7%), the expansion far exceeds the candidate growth, leading to eased overall competition and an expected backward shift in ranking; however, the university's rising ranking, hot Douyin popularity, and enhanced appeal of popular engineering majors positively boost application enthusiasm. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking is about 11047, with a range of 10547–11547.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Marine Science (with Basic Discipline Top Talent Plan 2.0 Base)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Marine Technology
- Automation
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Atmospheric Science
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Sciences (Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science) (with Basic Discipline Top Talent Plan 2.0 Base)
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10547–11547, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Marine Science, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<10547), prioritize Tier 1 A+ disciplines like Marine Science; for rankings near the lower limit (>11547), focus on Tier 3 advantageous disciplines (Food Science and Engineering, Biological Sciences).

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学等文科专业社会热度偏热/推荐，新闻传播类明显劝退；陕西省2026年历史类考生约88500人，较2025年增长约17%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争基数增加；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，非本省高校；陕西考生跨省报考需考虑地域偏好，该校在陕文科招生规模较小（13–17人），无显著地域倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年小幅扩招（+15.4%）与考生规模显著增长（+17%）的双向作用，两者大致抵消；但学校排名持续提升、抖音热度较热对报考热度有正向拉动，历年位次呈后移趋势。，预测最低位次约1805名，区间1481–2129名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1177 → 1520 → 1423 → 1507 → 1680, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 260 positions in the last three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 1680 positions; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Shaanxi was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 15, an expansion of about 15.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years; in 2023, there was an abnormal record of a 6211-position drop in a minor language major, but this is an individual major phenomenon; Douyin popularity ranks 21st overall (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications; the university's A- and above disciplines (Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-) are mainly science and engineering, with no directly corresponding advantageous disciplines for liberal arts majors, but the 985 platform still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular/recommended, while Journalism and Communication categories are clearly discouraged; the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi Province in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competition; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university; cross-provincial applications by Shaanxi candidates need to consider regional preferences, and the university's liberal arts enrollment in Shaanxi is small (13–17 people), with no significant regional bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two-way effects of a slight expansion in 2026 (+15.4%) and a significant increase in candidate numbers (+17%), they roughly offset each other; however, the university's rising ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity positively drive application heat, while historical rankings show a declining trend. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1805, with a range of 1481–2129.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Law (with the Ministry of Education's Collaborative Training Innovation Base for Foreign-Related Legal Talents (Cultivation)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Political Science and Administration
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Network and New Media)
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Administrative Management (eligible for selection to the Global Environmental Governance Dual Degree Program)
- Tourism Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1481–2129, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<1481), you can focus on aiming for Law and Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is near the lower limit (>2129), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors such as Administrative Management.
